Rule.name: CNC_RME_DownloadRolesRule
Rule.Description: This is an example rule for selecting who must supply a password to impersonate another identity.

Argument.name: loggedInUser
Argument.Description: The log object associated with the SailPointContext.

Argument.name: roleIds
Argument.Description: List of roleIds selected to download, this could be null

Argument.name: context
Argument.Description: A sailpoint.api.SailPointContext object that can be used to query the database if necessary.
